name: Bitly
price_basis: Core at $10 per month sold as a $120 annual charge, annual plan only, checked 2026-07
verdict_reason: KILL: $120 a year renting short links. A redirect is one route and a JSON map on a domain you own.
what_zo_builds: A link shortener on your own domain: one redirect route, a JSON map of slugs to destinations, and a click log you can actually query. QR codes generate at create time. No monthly link meter, and your links stop depending on someone else's domain reputation to survive spam filters.
dont_kill_if: Marketing runs on Bitly's campaign analytics across a team, or thousands of printed QR codes already point at bit.ly URLs you cannot reprint.
build_brief: Goal: replace Bitly Core with short links on a domain I own. Export my existing Bitly links and click counts. Create a redirect route backed by a JSON slug map, import the old links, and add a create endpoint that returns a short URL and a QR code. Log clicks with timestamp and referrer to a file I can query. Update the links I control to the new domain and let legacy bit.ly links age out. Done when new links ship from my domain and the annual charge is canceled.
